title: arif_think (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_think`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_think` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Mandatory for non-trivial tasks. arif_think cannot be trusted without this pass.

symbolic_reasoning_pass.description: §3.D — Mandatory 6-axis symbolic_reasoning_pass for every non-trivial task.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_think output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
